---
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: ../MastersDoctoralThesis
    classoption: ["12pt", "english", "doublespacing", ""]
---

# Introduction {#sec-Chapter1}

## Background of the Study

Write something here >> @who_global_tb_report_2025

## Statement of the Problem

Write something here >> @who_tb_knowledge_platform_2026

## General Objective

Write something here >>

## Specific Objectives

Write something here >>
